settings.storePath.label: Password Store Path
settings.storePath.desc: Custom path to the password store (default: ~/.password-store)
settings.typeDelay.label: Launcher Close Delay
settings.typeDelay.desc: Delay before typing starts in milliseconds (default: 500)
settings.wtypeDelay.label: Wtype Keystroke Delay
settings.wtypeDelay.desc: Delay between keystrokes in ms for wtype (default: 12)
settings.clipTimeout.label: Clipboard Timeout
settings.clipTimeout.desc: Seconds before clipboard is cleared (default PASSWORD_STORE_CLIP_TIME: {value})
